title: Boat Rental in Murray River: A 2026 Guide to Cruising the River
html:
Exploring the Murray River by boat offers a unique perspective on Australia's longest waterway. For a self-drive motorboat from Renmark, expect to pay from EUR 250 for a half day. BoatHire24 connects you with verified operators to make your trip seamless.

Where to set off in Murray River

Popular departure points include Renmark, Mildura, and Echuca, each offering access to calm waters and scenic riverbanks. Renmark is a hub with the Renmark Riverfront precinct and several marinas. Mildura provides easy launching at Apex Park. Echuca's historic port district is a favourite. Other options include Waikerie, with its cliffside views, and Murray Bridge near the lower reaches. Every location has ample parking and basic facilities. One option worth a look is the Maiora 26m for hire.

Which boat to rent

Choose a boat that matches your party size and preferred activities, from fishing to luxury cruising.

  1. Luxury motor yacht, ideal for up to eight guests on a full-day cruise with amenities; from EUR 600. The Maiora 26m offers spacious decks and a flybridge.
  2. Pontoon boat, great for six to ten people, perfect for swimming and picnics; from EUR 200 half-day.
  3. Fishing boat, suitable for two to four anglers, with rod holders and live bait tank; from EUR 150.
  4. Houseboat, sleeps up to twelve for multi-day trips, with kitchen and bathrooms; from EUR 400 per night.
  5. Bowrider, sporty option for water sports with up to six guests; from EUR 180 half-day.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Murray River?

Rental prices range from EUR 30 per person for a shared tour to EUR 800 per day for a crewed luxury yacht.

  • Shared wildlife tour: EUR 30, 60 per person.
  • Small motorboat (half-day): EUR 150, 250.
  • Catamaran (full-day): EUR 400, 600.
  • Crewed yacht (full-day): EUR 700, 800 plus fuel.
You can compare verified listings and hire a boat directly on BoatHire24.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Murray River?

In South Australia and Victoria, a boat licence is required for vessels with engines over 4.5 kW, but some operators offer licence-exempt hire. Always confirm with the rental company, as they may provide a brief safety briefing without requiring a formal licence.

On the Murray River, the summer high season runs from November to March, when afternoon northerly winds can pick up, so moor early. Local operators at Renmark recommend starting your trip before 10am for the calmest conditions.

At a glance

  • Price band: EUR 30, 800 per person or per boat
  • Peak months: November to March
  • Trip length: 2 hours to 7 days
  • Guest capacity: 2, 12 passengers
  • Currency: EUR (prices in this guide)

Questions about boat rental in Murray River

Can I rent a boat in Murray River without a licence?

Yes, several operators along the river offer unlicensed hire for small motorboats up to 4.5 kW, subject to a safety induction.

What is the best month to boat on the Murray River?

April and October offer mild weather and fewer crowds, though the summer peak from December to February provides the warmest swimming opportunities.

How far can I travel from Renmark in a day?

A typical day trip covers up to 60 nautical miles downstream, reaching the Chowilla floodplains in South Australia.

How boat rental works on BoatHire24

You can search, compare, and book directly through the platform. Each listing shows equipment, cancellation policy, and real availability. To understand the booking flow, visit the page on how boat rental works.

Whether you want a short spin or a week-long houseboating adventure, the Murray River delivers. If you own a boat here, you can rent out your boat through BoatHire24 to reach visitors from around the world.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Murray River and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
